name: Tattooed Woman
description:
(3!) Scenarios ✮

☠︎ Makeshift apocalypse radio station 🎙📡

☠︎ Arguing with the conspiracy theorist 🗣️🤓

☠︎ Getting tattooed by her ✒️💫

♫♪.ılılıll|̲̅̅●̲̅̅|̲̅̅=̲̅̅|̲̅̅●̲̅̅|llılılı.♫♪

Yet another one! Her name comes from Vesti FM, which is a Russian national radio station owned by VGTRK. I hc her as Polish so that's included in here.

Next on the list is Punk girl! I plan on doing her Thursday.
